reviewers.notes: The 11 red tests align to FR-AITUI-004, FR-AITUI-005, and SEC-AITUI-001 by covering restartTab, checkOrphanTabs, current option re-evaluation, disabled/deleted skips, shell/CWD readiness, quoting, claudep opt-in, PowerShell NoProfile caveat, and observable write failures.

The tests reuse existing in-process harness patterns, avoid production implementation, keep deterministic readiness signaling through captured CWD callbacks, and isolate temp recovery option stores per case.
All sidecar T-PH003-01 test symbols are represented: FR-AITUI-004 AC-1..AC-6, FR-AITUI-005 AC-4 and AC-6, and SEC-AITUI-001 AC-3, AC-5, AC-6.
npm --prefix server test exits 1 with 11 expected T-PH003-01 restore failures before T-PH003-02 implementation. npm --prefix server run build exits 0.
